creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
I would definitely be fine with having libedit be the default.  I only made it be optional for POLA but do not have information on what anyone would actually notice.

While the patch uses the ports version, is it better to use that or the base version of libedit?  I do not recall if the base versions of contrib libraries are primarily for just the base system or generally usable by ports.
